description:
## app [1.12.9](https://github.com/SilvaTechB/silva-manager/compare/v1.12.8...v1.12.9) (2026-03-29)


### Bug Fixes

* Revert patcher library to app.morphe:morphe-patcher:1.3.2 for Morphe patch compatibility
* Fix class namespace mismatch causing patches from api.morphe.software to fail at runtime
* Restore original app.morphe.patcher.* class references matching compiled Morphe patches
